name: Mushrooms Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute mushrooms in 1 tablespoon butter over medium heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain well and set aside.
3. Dissolve beef bouillon cube in hot water and set aside.
4. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a small saucepan. Add flour and stir until smooth.
5. Blend in pepper, cream, and dissolved beef bouillon. Stir into mushrooms.
6. Pour mixture into a greased casserole dish. Top with breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese.
7. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
